case_title: MARISOL MARTINEZ VS. KEN CHAU et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, MARISOL AS TO DEFENDANT CHAU, KEN DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-25-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-25-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST BRIAN Y. CHING FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-25-2003 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-09-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LORETTA NAJERA. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-28-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST BRIAN Y. CHING FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-28-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-12-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-28-2003 CONTINUED TO JUL-30-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-30-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST BRIAN Y. CHING, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-30-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-15-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY PATRICIA VAN STEENBERGE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2003 CONTINUED TO OCT-01-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST BRIAN Y. CHING, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-01-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-16-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SUSAN LEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-01-2003 CONTINUED TO FEB-11-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-11-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
